description: Unit test suite for functions 'extractNameAndCurrentRole' and 'extractBestNameAndRoleFromDocuments' in the 'nameRoleExtraction' utility module. It verifies extraction logic for names and roles from various document formats like performance reviews, job descriptions, resumes, and combined documents.

methods.name: extractNameAndCurrentRole
methods.description: Extracts an employee's name and role from a single document, such as a performance review or job description.

methods.name: extractBestNameAndRoleFromDocuments
methods.description: Chooses the best name and role from multiple documents, prioritizing resume data over job descriptions, and extracting role from the job description when the resume lacks explicit role information.
